name: Top Gun Maverick trailer from start
ad: The clip features a series of dynamic scenes. A pilot in a flight suit rides a motorcycle on a runway, smiling confidently. Explosions occur in a snowy landscape, accompanied by a large number "1." A jet flies low over a desert terrain, kicking up dust. Military personnel interact inside a building, with one officer speaking to others, including a woman who appears engaged in the conversation.

name: John Wick 4 trailer from start
ad: The clip opens with a bright orange background featuring the text "LIONSGATE" in bold letters. It transitions to a dimly lit, grand interior of a cathedral, showcasing tall columns and rows of empty wooden chairs. Two figures sit facing each other in the foreground, surrounded by flickering candlelight, creating an atmosphere of tension. Close-ups reveal one character wearing sunglasses and a turtleneck, while the other appears in dark attire, both engaged in a serious conversation.

name: Mission Impossible trailer from start
ad: The clip features a series of dynamic scenes. A person rides a motorcycle on a rocky outcrop with mountains in the background, showcasing a vast landscape. The next shot captures a steep drop-off, emphasizing the height. Subsequent scenes depict a figure walking through a foggy corridor and another silhouette working at a desk. The final image shows a person rushing through a doorway, surrounded by dust.

name: Spider-Man No Way Home trailer from start
ad: The clip features intense scenes from a superhero movie. A young man with tousled hair is shown in close-up, appearing distressed and wet, with city lights reflecting in the background. The title card for "Spider-Man: No Way Home" appears against a black background. Other scenes depict skyscrapers with large digital billboards, a rooftop confrontation between characters, and a figure in a red and black suit, suggesting action and drama.

name: The Batman trailer from start
ad: The clip opens in a dimly lit urban alley, revealing a neon-lit diner in the background. Two shadowy figures move stealthily toward the diner. Inside, a person in a dark jacket is seen leaning over a counter, appearing focused on something. The scene shifts to a close-up of a white coffee cup with a green stripe, resting on a dark surface, emphasizing its solitude.

name: Dune Part Two trailer from start
ad: The clip features a vast desert landscape with rolling sand dunes under a warm, golden light. Two figures sit closely together on a dune, gazing into the distance. Their silhouettes are visible against the backdrop of the dunes. The scene shifts to a close-up of one figure, who smiles warmly, and then to a darkened scene with indistinct shapes. Finally, a woman peeks out from beneath a large, ornate headpiece, revealing her eyes and intricate adornments.
